emails.subject: RE: Titan-Schaffer Option
emails.body: Oh, I don't know.............. I guess about as many times as you have to say "don't do anything unless I ask you to." Attached is the Schaeffer Memorandum of Option that Piper Rudnick prepared (just in case they decide to go ahead and the Option executed today or next week). The Schaffer's should probably execute at the same time, don't you think? Kay Mann 02/09/2001 01:58 PM
